channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Utah Hockey Club narrows the choice of a permanent name to three finalists. It won't be the Yeti
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — The Utah Hockey Club has chosen three finalists for the permanent team name it will adopt beginning with the 2025-26 NHL season. The franchise will use a final round of fan voting to decide among the Utah Mammoth, Utah Hockey Club and Utah Wasatch.
item.dc:creator: JOHN COON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Courtney Vandersloot to sign with Chicago Sky, returning to franchise that drafted her
item.description: Free agent guard Courtney Vandersloot is headed back to Chicago, her agent confirmed to The Associated Press on Wednesday. The veteran guard will sign with the team that drafted her in 2011 after spending the last two seasons in New York, agent Lindsay Kagawa Colas said.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bookmaker sets Travis Kelce proposal odds for Super Bowl LIX
item.description: There are odds to bet on virtually anything related to the Super Bowl, and one bookmaker has odds for Travis Kelce's potential marriage proposal to Taylor Swift.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Boys Basketball: San Marcos 82, Poway 48
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys Basketball at Poway on Tuesday evening with the Titans hosting San Marcos. The Titans were down 22-18 at the end of the 1st, but down 13 at the break and San Marcos kept the pedal to the metal and pulled off in the 2nd half and won 82-48.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Super Bowl LIX will be 'No Drone Zone' amid incursions
item.description: Airspace over the Caesars Superdome in New Orleans will be heavily restricted from drones during Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Objections flow in on NCAA settlement over 'unnecessarily harsh' impact of roster limits
item.description: Most of the objections posted so far to the lawsuit settlement set to alter the college-sports model concerned the impact roster limits will have on players in so-called “Olympic sports,” some of whom have already been cut from their teams.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Ohio State quality control coach placed on leave amid university investigation
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (AP) — Ohio State defensive quality control coach Joe Lyberger has been on paid administrative leave for the last month while the university investigates him. Ohio State's human resources department sent Lyberger a letter on Dec. 27 that noted he would be placed on leave immediately.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: School official appears to advise parents of trans athletes to change birth certificate to play girls' sports
item.description: Texas school district administrator allegedly seen instructing a prospective parent to change their trans child's birth certificate to play in girls' sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Caitlin Clark declines invite to a 3-point shootout at NBA All-Star weekend
item.description: Caitlin Clark is going to wait until Indianapolis hosts the WNBA All-Star weekend in July to enter her first 3-point contest as a pro.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NBA players Rudy Gobert, Mouhamed Gueye nearly hit by falling debris during game
item.description: Minnesota Timberwolves center Rudy Gobert and Atlanta Hawks big man Mouhamed Gueye walked away unscathed as a piece of debris fell from the Target Center jumbotron.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eagles' run to the Super Bowl vs. the Chiefs is fueled by changes after epic collapse last season
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — The Eagles were indeed flying high as the best in the NFL, boasting a 10-1 record with a No. 1 seed, home-field advantage in the playoffs, and yes, a Super Bowl ring all ahead as credible goals. This season? On the way to the Super Bowl on Feb.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Super Bowl footballs are ready to go within hours of the matchup being set
item.description: As soon as this year's Super Bowl matchup was set, workers at the Wilson Sporting Goods football factory jumped into action. The factory in the rural village of Ada, Ohio, makes the game balls used by every NFL team along with many of the nation’s top college programs and high schools.
item.dc:creator: JOHN SEEWER, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah HC ends road trip with 3-1 loss at Ottawa
item.description: OTTAWA (ABC4 Sports) - Leevi Merilainen made 34 saves, and the Ottawa Senators won 3-1 against the Utah Hockey Club at Canadian Tire Centre on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Mahomes and the Chiefs will face Hurts, Barkley and the Eagles as they seek a Super Bowl three-peat
item.description: Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce and the Kansas City Chiefs are going for a three-peat in a Super Bowl rematch. This time, Jalen Hurts and the Philadelphia Eagles have Saquon Barkley. The Eagles and Chiefs will face off for the Lombardi Trophy for the second time in three years on Feb.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Saunders, Demin lead BYU past Cincinnati, 80-52
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Behind its best shooting half of the season, BYU outscored Cincinnati by 23 in the second half en route to 80-52 victory over the Bearcats on Saturday evening at the Marriott Center. “We have a lot of good shooters," BYU head coach Kevin Young said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: UVU wins 10th straight game, beating Seattle 70-66
item.description: SEATTLE (ABC4 Sports) - There is no slowing down the Utah Valley men's basketball team right now. Carter Welling scored a career-high 24 points, and Dominick Nelson added 16 as Utah Valley earned a hard-fought 70-66 road win over Seattle U on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 25-year-old San Diego native pursuing pro golf dreams at Farmers Invitational
item.description: The Farmer's Insurance Invitational, presented by the Advocates Professional Golf Association (APGA) Tour, is taking place on the North Course at Torrey Pines, showcasing the next generation of professional golfers and supporting minority players who dream of joining the PGA Tour.
item.dc:creator: Tony Shin, Fox 5

item.title: Harris English holds off Sam Stevens by a shot in the Farmers Insurance Open at Torrey Pines
item.description: Harris English held off hard-charging Sam Stevens to win the Farmers Insurance Open by one shot, securing his fifth career PGA Tour victory with a 1-over 73 in challenging weather.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Runnin' Utes get swept by Baylor, 76-61
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a tough week offensively for the Utah basketball team. After scoring just 35 points against Houston, the Utes put up 61 in a 76-61 loss to Baylor Saturday at the Huntsman Center. Norchad Omier had 22 points and 12 rebounds, and V.J.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Australian Open: Keys upsets 2-time champion Sabalenka in women's final for 1st Grand Slam title
item.description: When Madison Keys stepped into Rod Laver Arena at 7:37 p.m. on Saturday night ahead of the Australian Open final, she strode right past the Daphne Akhurst Memorial Cup, the trophy that goes to the women's champion and was placed on a pedestal near the entrance to the court.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Hurricanes acquire Rantanen from Avs, Hall from Blackhawks in 3-team trade
item.description: For the second straight year, the Carolina Hurricanes are taking a significant swing to bolster a perennial playoff team.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Lawsuit says ex-Yankee Mariano Rivera failed to protect a girl from sexual abuse at a church camp
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — New York Yankees legend Mariano Rivera and his wife are accused in a lawsuit of failing to protect a young girl who was sexually abused by an older child during a summer camp trip sponsored by their church.
item.dc:creator: JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, NewsNation
